title: dasymaschalon coelophloeum
intro: Dasymaschalon coelophloeum, also known as the coelophloeum or Chinese pepper, is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae that is native to the tropical regions of Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, particularly its seeds, which possess medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dasymaschalon coelophloeum include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into capsules, teas, or tinctures for consumption, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
